title: coupon — declared entitlements
description: Six entitlement keys. `coupon_capture` is the boolean master gate — on for every tier by default. `coupon_slot` caps the number of ACTIVE coupons per tenant (Small=10, Medium=100, Enterprise=unlimited). `coupon_bulk_issue` (Medium+) unlocks the POST /coupons/bulk-issue endpoint for campaign codes. `coupon_advanced_discount_types` (Medium+) unlocks `free_period`, `first_month_free`, `bogo` discount types — Small tier limited to `percent` + `fixed_amount` + `free_shipping`. `coupon_stackable` (Enterprise) permits multiple coupons applied to a single invoice with defined precedence. `coupon_extended_retention` (Enterprise) extends the 7y retention window to 10y for regulated tenants.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = the whole module is inert: no coupons may be created, existing coupons refuse new redemptions, validate/preview routes return 402. Every tier defaults on — off is an emergency ops-flip only.
enforcedBy: CouponObserver refuses create when the gate is closed
CouponRedeemer::redeem() refuses when the gate is closed (surfaces as COUPON_CAPTURE_NOT_ENTITLED on the caller — invoice/membership module)
SDUI surfaces hidden when features array does not include 'coupon.core'

entitlements.description: How many ACTIVE coupons a tenant can hold concurrently. Small: 10 (one primary + a few seasonal). Medium: 100 (campaign codes + partner codes). Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on create; released on delete OR on transition to `is_active=false` past valid_until.
enforcedBy: ExpireCouponsJob releases 1 unit when the coupon expires (valid_until past + is_active flipped false)

entitlements.description: Enables POST /api/v1/coupons/bulk-issue — batch-create N unique campaign codes for a named marketing campaign. Small tenants create coupons one at a time.
enforcedBy: BulkIssueCouponAction refuses when the gate is closed

entitlements.description: Enables discount_type IN ('free_period', 'first_month_free', 'bogo'). Small tier limited to `percent` + `fixed_amount` + `free_shipping`.
enforcedBy: CouponObserver.creating refuses when discount_type IS IN advanced set AND entitlement is off (returns COUPON_ADVANCED_DISCOUNT_NOT_ENTITLED)
SDUI create form filters the discount_type ComboBox options by entitlement

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Permits multiple coupons applied to a single invoice with defined precedence order (first_month_free -> bogo -> percent -> fixed_amount -> free_shipping -> free_period). When off: one coupon per invoice; the invoice/membership module refuses a second redemption with COUPON_STACKING_NOT_ENTITLED.
enforcedBy: CouponObserver.creating refuses when is_stackable=true AND entitlement is off
CouponRedeemer::redeem() refuses when a redemption already exists on the same (applied_to_type, applied_to_id) AND is_stackable would need to be true on both coupons AND entitlement is off

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends retention from 7y default to 10y for financial audit alignment (some regulated tenants require 10y for tax audit trails on discount records).
enforcedBy: PurgeExpiredCouponsJob reads the entitlement to select the retention window (7y default; 10y when on)
MigrateRedemptionsToArchiveOnTenantErased applies the 10y window when the tenant held the entitlement at erasure time
